info.name: Smart School API (Parent/Student + Legacy)
info.description:
Auto-generated from controllers.

Two bases:
- {{base_url}}/customapi/... = Parent/Student app (main CI app). Multi-school aware: send school_id or school_code (or X-School-Code header) on login.
- {{base_url}}/api/... = Legacy separate CI app (Auth + Webservice).

Variables: base_url, school_id, school_code, token, user_id, student_id.
